design: Between-subjects on MERIT Intelligence Report popup only (cohort ranking overlay NOT shown). Per-candidate MERIT score + skill breakdown always visible in popup (no scoreless mode). Visible vs Blind default. N=8 (4 recruiters, 4 peers); 4 per condition. Same four profiles, Intern Backend JD (Study 07). Recruiters distinct from Study 14.

aisling_hunt.justification: Junior DS lane vs intern backend JD; Berkeley/Stripe strong but wrong track on visible popup.

vincent_germain.justification: Intern title and mangled PDF header; filtered before deep read despite mid MERIT score.

riko_altayer.justification: Top MERIT score on popup plus Cambridge/Imperial/Stripe—fast-track on visible report.

jude_washington.justification: iOS-first profile and unknown employers; ranked above Vincent on MERIT but not intern-backend fit.

aisling_hunt.justification: WiDS extracurricular and DS stack; would not submit to HM for this req.

vincent_germain.justification: Shopify intern—client needs 2+ years FTE; lowest MERIT score on popup confirms deprioritise.

riko_altayer.justification: Pedigree and senior systems depth; obvious shortlist on visible Intelligence Report popup.

jude_washington.justification: Mobile title and weak logo recognition on visible CV panel.

aisling_hunt.justification: Strong projects on visible view; worried WiDS line looks like token shortlist.

vincent_germain.justification: Broken PDF name parse looked sloppy; lowest MERIT score on popup.

riko_altayer.justification: Elite CV and highest MERIT score on popup—clear shortlist.

jude_washington.justification: Quick scan: junior and off-role for backend intern posting.

aisling_hunt.justification: Stats/ML tilt visible on CV; misaligned with Go/PostgreSQL intern JD.

vincent_germain.justification: Intern keyword plus lowest MERIT score on popup—auto filter.

riko_altayer.justification: Imperial + Cambridge impossible to ignore with MERIT at top.

jude_washington.justification: Gut shortlist on name pattern—flagged possible bias to facilitator.

aisling_hunt.justification: Candidate #2: Python/SQL/Docker/Airflow read as transferable; mid MERIT score on popup but skills fit intern data/backend work.

vincent_germain.justification: Without intern label, Node/PostgreSQL/Shopify projects meet bar; MERIT underranks vs skills block.

riko_altayer.justification: Blind review: staff-level scope for INTERN req—overqualified despite highest MERIT score (Study 08 tension).

jude_washington.justification: Neutral layout surfaces API coursework; shortlist for comparison though still borderline.

aisling_hunt.justification: Blind extract still ML-heavy; would not advance for intern backend req.

vincent_germain.justification: Redacted Shopify/pg/docker credible; tenure still intern-appropriate once title hidden.

riko_altayer.justification: Still strongest systems depth on skills alone; keep for HM sanity-check even if overqualified.

jude_washington.justification: Blind popup still Swift-heavy; weakest backend evidence among four profiles.

aisling_hunt.justification: Blind comparison easier without gendered extracurricular cues.

vincent_germain.justification: Structured blind skill block shows real intern backend work; MERIT score felt too low.

riko_altayer.justification: Still best raw systems fit on neutral cards.

jude_washington.justification: REST/API bullets clearer in blind MERIT view than on visible iOS layout.

vincent_germain.justification: Skills improved on paper but still lowest MERIT score among the four popups.

riko_altayer.justification: High MERIT and depth; less logo-driven but clearly strong.

jude_washington.justification: Forced bullet reread—still mostly SwiftUI, not enough BE.
